functional_purpose: Polls a local document-management folder for binary correspondence files and copies each file unchanged to an SMB share.
business_process: Delivers generated clinical correspondence to a shared letters location.
main_transformer_stages: Passes the source raw binary message as the destination file template.
error_handling: Source errors move the file to the configured error directory; successfully processed source files are deleted.
retry_behaviour: Destination queueing is disabled and retryCount is 0.
queue_behaviour: No destination queue; source connector buffer size is 1000.
logging: No channel-specific logging script is configured; production message storage retains content.

evidence.claim: Bolton | CORRESPONDENCE OUT | 7a04b9d1-70ac-4008-b809-732b88267f5c | Bolton/CORRESPONDENCE OUT.xml | source connector lines 10-104 is a File Reader polling /mnt/docman as binary RAW data, deleting successful source files and moving read errors to an error directory.

Bolton | CORRESPONDENCE OUT | 7a04b9d1-70ac-4008-b809-732b88267f5c | Bolton/CORRESPONDENCE OUT.xml | destination Copy file to share lines 112-201 is a File Writer using SMB and template ${message.rawData}; it has queueEnabled false and retryCount 0.
evidence.location: destination connector Copy file to share lines 112-201

evidence.claim: Bolton | CORRESPONDENCE OUT | 7a04b9d1-70ac-4008-b809-732b88267f5c | Bolton/CORRESPONDENCE OUT.xml | channel properties lines 218-252 set production message storage and retain message content.

functional_purpose: Receives DICOM studies, extracts DICOM demographic and device metadata, submits the binary object to PayloadProcessor, and conditionally writes compatible Zeiss IOLMaster files to an import folder.
business_process: Ingests imaging and biometry from PACS or devices into OpenEyes processing and the IOLMaster importer.

destination_connectors.name: Write out file to IolMasterImport incoming folder when device is a Zeiss IOLMaster

ack_behaviour: The DICOM listener auto-generates its response after source transformation.
main_filters: IOLMaster file write accepts only Zeiss IOLMaster studies with one of two configured supported SOP Class UIDs.
main_transformer_stages: Extracts patient, study, device, and AET metadata into channelMap.
Reads configurationMap:defaultPatientIdentifierType to derive identifier type and institution from the local AET.
Builds a PayloadProcessor dicom_request submission with DICOM content.
error_handling: No explicit custom error handler is configured.
retry_behaviour: Both file and HTTP destinations have queueing disabled and retryCount 0.
queue_behaviour: No destination queues; the source connector buffer size is 1000.
logging: The IOLMaster eligibility filter logs the SOP Class UID, which is technical metadata; production storage is enabled and attachments are stored.

evidence.claim: Bolton | DICOM | c14efd23-2c1c-4e53-a59f-dcfe0e727c3b | Bolton/DICOM.xml | source connector lines 10-290 is a DICOM Listener on port 11112 with auto-generated response after source transformation; its mapper steps extract patient, study, device, and AET fields.

Bolton | DICOM | c14efd23-2c1c-4e53-a59f-dcfe0e727c3b | Bolton/DICOM.xml | source transformer Extract identifier_type and institution_id from Local AET lines 204-226 reads configurationMap:defaultPatientIdentifierType and writes per-message channelMap values.

Bolton | DICOM | c14efd23-2c1c-4e53-a59f-dcfe0e727c3b | Bolton/DICOM.xml | destination Write out file to IolMasterImport incoming folder lines 406-509 writes to /mnt/dicom only when its enabled filter identifies Zeiss IOLMaster and supported SOP Class UIDs.

Bolton | DICOM | c14efd23-2c1c-4e53-a59f-dcfe0e727c3b | Bolton/DICOM.xml | destination PayloadProcessor API Send lines 514-651 POSTs application/dicom to /api/v1/request/queue/add with request_type dicom_request using preemptive HTTP Basic authentication; queueing is disabled and retryCount is 0.
evidence.location: destination connector PayloadProcessor API Send lines 514-651

evidence.claim: Bolton | DICOM | c14efd23-2c1c-4e53-a59f-dcfe0e727c3b | Bolton/DICOM.xml | channel properties lines 667-707 enable production storage and attachment storage.

functional_purpose: Receives HL7v2 PAS messages and updates OpenEyes patients, appointments, patient merges, and did-not-attend records through PASAPI.
business_process: Synchronizes PAS patient identity, appointment, merge, and DNA events into OpenEyes.
ack_behaviour: The TCP source auto-generates an ACK before processing and does not wait for processing to finish.
main_filters: Secondary patient and patient merge destinations accept A40.
Appointment PUT and DELETE require successful patient transmission and appointment conditions.
DNA destination requires A05 with PV1.14 equal to DNA.
main_transformer_stages: Transforms inbound HL7 into PASAPI patient XML and derives patient, visit, clinic, doctor, and appointment values.
Parses PASAPI responses for warnings and patient IDs.
Creates appointment, merge, and DNA XML request bodies for the matching destination.
error_handling: Response transformers inspect PASAPI responses for warning blocks; no explicit custom error handler is configured.
retry_behaviour: All HTTP destinations shown have queueing disabled and retryCount 0.
queue_behaviour: No destination queues; source connector buffer size is 1000.
logging: No explicit logger calls were identified in the configured channel scripts; production message content is retained.

evidence.claim: Bolton | PAS IN | 7a7288a3-5ade-46bc-921d-56baf0a6bf06 | Bolton/PAS IN.xml | source connector lines 10-140 is a TCP Listener on port 6661, with auto-generated response before processing and respondAfterProcessing false.

Bolton | PAS IN | 7a7288a3-5ade-46bc-921d-56baf0a6bf06 | Bolton/PAS IN.xml | PASAPI - Secondary Patient lines 148-623 PUTs transformed PatientXML to PASAPI/V2/Patient/${SecondaryHospitalNumber}, uses preemptive HTTP Basic authentication, parses warnings and PatientId, and filters for A40.
evidence.location: destination connector PASAPI - Secondary Patient lines 148-623

evidence.claim: Bolton | PAS IN | 7a7288a3-5ade-46bc-921d-56baf0a6bf06 | Bolton/PAS IN.xml | PASAPI - Patient lines 629-1175 PUTs PatientXML to PASAPI/V2/Patient/${HospitalNumber}; its filter excludes M05.

Bolton | PAS IN | 7a7288a3-5ade-46bc-921d-56baf0a6bf06 | Bolton/PAS IN.xml | Clinic List - PUT and Clinic List - DELETE lines 1181-1727 call PASAPI/V2/PatientAppointment/${VisitID} with PUT and DELETE respectively after successful patient transmission and appointment filters.
evidence.location: destination connectors Clinic List - PUT and Clinic List - DELETE lines 1181-1727

evidence.claim: Bolton | PAS IN | 7a7288a3-5ade-46bc-921d-56baf0a6bf06 | Bolton/PAS IN.xml | PASAPI - Patient Merge lines 1733-1973 PUTs a PatientMerge body to PASAPI/V1/PatientMerge and filters for A40; Clinic List - DNA lines 1978-2256 PUTs DidNotAttend to PASAPI/V2/DidNotAttend when A05 has PV1.14 DNA.
evidence.location: destination connectors PASAPI - Patient Merge and Clinic List - DNA lines 1733-2256

evidence.claim: Bolton | PAS IN | 7a7288a3-5ade-46bc-921d-56baf0a6bf06 | Bolton/PAS IN.xml | channel properties lines 2273-2309 set production message storage and retain content; all listed HTTP destination property blocks set queueEnabled false and retryCount 0.
evidence.location: destination connector properties and channel properties lines 148-2309

functional_purpose: Accepts an HTTP query request, creates an HL7 Q21 with timestamps, message ID, and hospital number, sends it to a remote PAS over MLLP, and returns a transformed K21 result as XML.
business_process: Provides remote PAS patient lookup to an HTTP caller.
source_system: HTTP client requesting a PAS lookup
ack_behaviour: The remote MLLP sender waits for a response, validates HL7 ACK response codes AA or CA, and validates message control ID; the HTTP listener returns destination d6 after processing.
main_filters: The remote Q21 send requires QRD.8.1 search value.
Response conversion and XSLT transformation run only after Send Q21 has status SENT.
main_transformer_stages: Sets Q21 timestamp and message ID fields and copies the hosnum request parameter into the query.
Converts the remote K21 HL7 response to XML.
Uses XSLT to form the final response, or returns an empty PatientList when absent.
error_handling: Returns an empty PatientList element when no transformed response exists.
retry_behaviour: Destination queueing is disabled and retryCount is 0; MLLP transmission allows maxRetries 2.
queue_behaviour: No destination queues; source connector buffer size is 1000.
logging: No explicit channel-specific logging script is configured; production message content is retained.

evidence.claim: Bolton | PAS OUT | 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c | Bolton/PAS OUT.xml | source connector lines 10-139 is an HTTP Listener on port 6663 with responseVariable d6 and firstResponse true; source transformer steps set Q21 timestamps, message IDs, and hosnum.

Bolton | PAS OUT | 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c | Bolton/PAS OUT.xml | destination Send Q21 lines 147-385 is a TCP Sender using MLLP to a remote PAS endpoint, with maxRetries 2, response timeout 60000, HL7 ACK validation, and a filter requiring QRD.8.1.

Bolton | PAS OUT | 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c | Bolton/PAS OUT.xml | destination Convert K21 to XML lines 388-524 reads the Send Q21 response, converts HL7V2 to XML, and runs only when d1 is SENT.
evidence.location: destination connector Convert K21 to XML lines 388-524

evidence.claim: Bolton | PAS OUT | 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c | Bolton/PAS OUT.xml | Create response and Respond destinations lines 531-1006 use XSLT for the transformed response and return <PatientList/> when TransformedResponse is absent; their response flow requires d1 SENT.
evidence.location: destination connectors Create response and Respond lines 531-1006

evidence.claim: Bolton | PAS OUT | 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c | Bolton/PAS OUT.xml | channel properties lines 1023-1071 set production message storage and retain content; all destination property blocks set queueEnabled false and retryCount 0.
evidence.location: destination connector properties and channel properties lines 147-1071
